reviews.comment:
No tenían productos de la línea de cuidado del vehículo y el Shop no estaba disponible.
No sé pudieron aprovechar las promociones vigentes.
Fuera de eso, la atención de los playeros, es muy buena y cordial.

(Translated by Google)
They didn't have any car care products, and the shop was closed.
We couldn't take advantage of the current promotions.
Aside from that, the service from the attendants was very good and friendly.

reviews.comment:
Excepcional. Un lugar donde te atienden y ayudan hasta con los inconvenientes diarios.
Mencionar a Diego Bustos el mac guiver entre los muchachos, y a Cintia Clavero es lo minimo que corresponde. Un Gusto ir

(Translated by Google)
Exceptional. A place where they take care of you and help you with even the most everyday problems. Mentioning Diego Bustos, the MacGyver of the guys, and Cintia Clavero is the least that can be done. A pleasure to go.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atencion en sector de la playa. Minimamente un "Buen dia" pero ni eso... y ninguna de las clásica preguntas de las YPF. Completamos con infinia? Chequeamos aceite? Ticket? Factura? Abona con aplicación? Limpiamos parabrisas?? Dicho sea de paso me los tuve q limpiar yo... Los baños un asco de sucios.. tienen la concesión de Full y además son ACA.. es notoria la falta de capacitación y/o auditorias... Nose si esta permitido pero no le he visto en otras estaciones, muchos vehiculos atracan del lado incorrecto de la isla (del otro lado del tanque) y aun asi les cargan.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the gas station. At the very least, a "Good morning," but not even that... and none of the usual YPF questions. Should we top up with Infinia? Check the oil? Receipt? Invoice? Pay with the app? Do you need windshield cleaning? Incidentally, I had to clean them myself... The bathrooms were disgustingly dirty. They have the Full concession and are also ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) members... the lack of training and/or audits is obvious... I don't know if it's allowed, but I haven't seen it at other stations; many vehicles pull up on the wrong side of the pump island (the other side of the tank) and they still fill up.

reviewReply.comment:
Estimado cliente..
Tendremos muy en cuenta sus comentarios...
Verificaremos lo sucedido,..
Lo esperamos  nuevamente  en nuestras instalaciones!!!
